name: memcmp
title: memcmp
syntax: int memcmp(struct * dest, byte source[]); // form 1
int memcmp(byte dest[], struct * source); // form 2
int memcmp(struct * dest, struct * source); // form 3
int memcmp(byte dest[], byte source[], dword size); // form 4
description: Compares the bytes of the parameters. In form 3, both structs must have the same type.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the arrays (number of bytes to compare).

return: 0 if the bytes are equal; a value different from 0 if they are unequal
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
